workLog.entry: Created isolated PR worktree at /home/richard/src/GitHub/rjmurillo/ai-agents-pr-2426 from PR head e535a4f.
Merged origin/main, resolved conflicts in .claude/.claude-plugin/plugin.json and scripts/eval/eval-skill-overlap.py, and committed the merge.
Fixed form-factor report writing, fail-closed form-factor validation, dry-run skill file validation, variant validation, judge JSON parsing, and form-factor verdict handling.
Updated security-review skill mirror documentation, generated the Copilot skill copy, and fixed scoped orphan references in the active skill triage plan.

Process bugs observed: get_unresolved_review_threads.py exposes comment bodies as first_comment_body while the compact completion-gate view only shows database ids; build_all --check writes generated files before exiting 2; orphan-ref full scan reports existing repository drift outside this PR, so scoped targets were required.

nextSteps: Commit skill documentation, generated Copilot skill files, and this session log.
Run post-commit generated checks, push after SHA lease verification, resolve review threads, poll CI, rerun completion gate, and merge if all four conditions pass.
